response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with deep open-source and Linux credentials, but falls short on the role's core requirements: German proficiency is listed as basic against a hard C1 minimum, there is no formal team leadership or technical project management track record, and Python and UML — explicitly desired — are absent from the skill set. The profile fits a staff engineer role far better than a Head of Development position.
strengths: Deep open-source commitment, including founding and running the GISCollective platform since 2016
Broad, ~18-year engineering background spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems on Linux
Active mentor and knowledge-sharer through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: German listed as basic, well below the required C1 minimum
No formal experience leading teams, managing consultants, or owning technical project management
No evidence of Python or UML proficiency, both explicitly desired for the role
